untranslatable_reason: Signal requires OLS regression-based z-score of a spread between two assets in a pairs strategy. This requires: (1) dynamic spread calculation from two paired instruments, (2) rolling OLS regression fitting (120-bar window), (3) z-score standardization of residuals. None of these multi-instrument derivative indicators are available in the allowed indicator list. The allowed indicators are single-asset technical indicators only. A pairs strategy with spread z-score cannot be expressed using only the provided single-asset indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using returns as a proxy for spread deviation, but this fundamentally misrepresents the signal. The original signal is a sophisticated pairs trading strategy requiring co-integration analysis and OLS-based mean reversion detection, which requires indicators not in the allowed set.
